name: Boss Energy Limited
content: Boss Energy Limited is an Australian-based uranium producer focused on the development and operation of its flagship Honeymoon Uranium Project in South Australia. As one of the few permitted uranium mines in Australia, the company utilizes in-situ recovery (ISR) technology to extract uranium oxide. Boss Energy is committed to becoming a significant global uranium supplier, leveraging its high-grade resources and existing infrastructure to meet the growing international demand for clean, carbon-free nuclear energy. The company also holds strategic interests in uranium exploration projects across Australia and North America.
